items.name: The Mason Mount dance
items.description:
“The Mason Mount Dance”
This viral dance took over Roblox after Mason Mount first showed it in the locker room! With stiff hip moves, playful shoulders, and lots of energy, players across the platform started recreating it. Soon the emote spread everywhere with hashtags like #MasonMountDance and #MountMoves, making it one of the funniest and most recognizable dances in the community. Now you can bring the vibe to Roblox and join the trend!
Join my group for more:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/617143654/Nightmare-Wears#!/about
